column1: A single continuous five-second medium close-up in a modern living room. A man sits on a sofa facing the camera while a soccer match plays quietly on the television behind him. At about 0.3 seconds, he begins speaking and continues naturally until near the end of the shot. His face remains clearly visible, with continuous synchronized lip movement and no long pauses. <S>I waited all day for this match, and now our team might finally win.<E> Stable locked camera, natural facial motion, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one continuous clear male utterance covering almost the entire clip. Background: low-volume soccer crowd and one soft referee whistle. No television commentary and no overlapping voices.<ENDAUDCAP>
